name: Brown Transportation
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us) — no confirmed entity record retrieved
notes: Brown Transportation at 98 Intervale St, Dorchester, MA 02121 confirmed via LinkedIn/SignalHire/Prospeo as a trucking/transportation company with ~42-200 employees, CEO Glenda Brown. SAFER keyword search 'BROWN TRANSPORT'/'BROWN TRANSPORTATION' returned no MA carriers — closest hits (BROWN BUS TRANSPORTATION LLC USDOT 537565) are in Evansville IN, not MA. Company likely operates intrastate-only without an active USDOT registration, or under a different legal name. MA Secretary of State entity search inaccessible via WebFetch; no confirmed inc_date or entity_status. Could also be regulated by MA DPU. Match confidence LOW.

name: Union Street Bus
inc_date: 1887 (predecessor Union Street Railway Co.; current Union Street Bus Co Inc legal incorporation date not confirmed)
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us); NLRB case 01-CA-044781 confirms 'Union Street Bus Company, Inc.' as legal name in New Bedford, MA
notes: Union Street Bus Company, Inc. operates SRTA (Southeastern Regional Transit Authority) fixed-route and demand-response service in New Bedford from 65 Potomska St (which is also the SRTA New Bedford terminal). Historical predecessor Union Street Railway Co. was incorporated 1887. SAFER keyword searches for 'UNION STREET BUS' and 'UNION STREET' returned NO records — operations are intrastate transit, likely not requiring USDOT registration. NLRB case 01-CA-044781 (07/07/2008) confirms current legal name 'Union Street Bus Company, Inc.' at New Bedford, MA. Primary business is public transit (SRTA contract), not traditional yellow school bus. Match confidence LOW for FMCSA; entity existence confirmed via NLRB.

All Gomez carriers in Houston identified (Gomez Trucking Inc USDOT 1036283, Gomez Logistics LLC USDOT 2472347, Gomez J R Trucking LLC USDOT 1998263, A Gomez Trucking LLC USDOT 2964399) are FREIGHT/trucking, not passenger. name: Bus-Let Inc
carrier_operation: intrastate passenger/school bus (likely CA PUC TCP/PSC permit, not USDOT)
registry_source: California Secretary of State (bizfile) — Entity #0657284, Domestic Stock Corporation, name BUS-LET, INC., principal address 2770 Vail Ave, Los Angeles/Commerce, CA 90040; per b2bhint.com and cabusinessdb.com aggregators of CA SoS data
notes: Bus-Let, Inc. confirmed as California Domestic Stock Corporation, entity #0657284, incorporated August 3, 1972, principal at 2770 Vail Ave, Commerce/Los Angeles, CA 90040 (matches input address). CEO Mario A. Morales. Status: Active per California SoS aggregators. SAFER keyword searches for 'BUS-LET', 'BUSLET', 'BUS LET' all returned NO records, and the company is NOT in the 2013 SCPR California interstate motor carriers database. Bus-Let is therefore an intrastate-only California passenger carrier, regulated by California PUC (likely PSC for school/private school transport) and CHP School Bus Program, not USDOT/FMCSA. No power units/drivers data publicly available without CA PUC TCP/PSC carrier lookup. FMCSA match confidence LOW (no FMCSA record exists for this entity); CA SoS entity confidence HIGH.
